descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: average grain diameter

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: crystallographic orientation difference across boundaries
descriptors.rationale: Average angle between adjacent grain orientations

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.physical_meaning: degree of preferred crystallographic orientation
descriptors.rationale: Quantifies deviation from random orientation distribution

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.physical_meaning: ratio of grain length to width

representation.notes: greater than or equal to one

descriptors.name: grain boundary density
descriptors.physical_meaning: boundary area per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: Total interface area normalized by volume

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total dislocation line length per volume

representation.notes: typically ten to fifteen per meter squared

descriptors.name: recrystallization fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: volume fraction of recrystallized grains

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: frequency distribution of boundary types

descriptors.name: subgrain density
descriptors.physical_meaning: number of subgrains per unit volume

descriptors.name: kernel average misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: average misorientation within grain neighborhoods

descriptors.name: twin boundary fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: fraction of boundaries that are twins

descriptors.name: grain orientation spread
descriptors.physical_meaning: internal misorientation range within grains

descriptors.name: geometrically necessary dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: dislocations required to accommodate lattice curvature

descriptors.name: grain size distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: statistical spread of grain sizes

descriptors.name: precipitation state
descriptors.physical_meaning: size and distribution of precipitate particles

descriptors.name: misorientation angle distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: frequency distribution of all misorientation angles

representation.notes: two degree bins zero to sixty-two

descriptors.name: schmid factor distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: resolved shear stress factor across grains
descriptors.rationale: Statistical distribution of slip system favorability

representation.notes: bins from zero to point five

descriptors.name: stored energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: elastic energy from defects and distortions

descriptors.name: slip system activity
descriptors.physical_meaning: relative activation of crystallographic slip systems

descriptors.name: strain partitioning
descriptors.physical_meaning: heterogeneous strain distribution between grains

descriptors.name: phase volume fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: fraction of each crystallographic phase present

representation.notes: common alloys have two to three phases
